title: Golems Refreshed + Fresh Animations
description: Fresh Animations Compatibility with Golems Refreshed.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c90da438fa6317be7ec989965e2c8eebe26b2dc.png)

About:

This is an addon pack for Golems Refreshed that makes it compatible with Fresh Animations. 

Attention:
While Optifine is the more popular method of using CEM Packs, I would personally advise using Entity Model Features.

Download Entity Model Features for Forge/Fabric [here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features).

Fresh Animations by: FreshLX
